title: Lead Instructional Designer at MT Educare

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at MT Educare
jsonLd.description:
Join the MT Educare family as a Instructional Designer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
